User.title: User
User.description: A registered user of the application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: The time the user account was created.

Conversion.title: Conversion
Conversion.description: A record of a file conversion performed by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversion record.

userId.description: The ID of the user who performed the conversion.

originalName.description: The original name of the file.

convertedName.description: The name of the converted file.

originalFormat.description: The original format of the file.

targetFormat.description: The target format of the file.

size.description: The size of the original file in bytes.

convertedAt.description: The time the conversion was completed.

/users/{userId}/conversions/{conversionI.description: Stores conversion history for a specific user.
